welcome.title: Welcome to Let me Out VPN!
welcome.description: Here you can purchase access to secure and fast VPN via Outline.
welcome.action_text: To get started, click "Buy a key"

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.filter_description: Choose a user group for broadcast:
broadcast.prompt:
Send your message for broadcast.

Supported: text (HTML), photo, video, GIF.

Send /cancel to cancel.
broadcast.message_hint: Send text, photo, video or GIF for broadcast. HTML markup is supported.
broadcast.progress_hint: Broadcast is running in background. You will be notified when it's done.
broadcast.language_hint: The message will be sent only to users with the selected interface language.
broadcast.scheduled_hint: Broadcast will be sent at the specified time.
broadcast.schedule_time_hint: Enter the date and time for sending.

settings.title: Bot Settings
settings.description: Configuration is managed via environment variables (.env).

vpn_apps.choose_protocol: 📱 VPN Apps Which protocol do you use?

outline.title: 🌿 Outline Apps
outline.description: Choose the app for your operating system:
outline.action_text: After installation, add your access key to the app.

linux.title: 🐧 Linux
apps: v2rayA — web GUI, transparent proxy, easy to deploy on router/NAS
Clash Verge Rev — beautiful GUI, rule-based routing, Meta core

windows.title: 🪟 Windows
apps: v2rayN — de facto standard for Windows, reliable and practical
Clash Verge Rev — beautiful UI, great rule-based routing

macos.title: 🍎 macOS
apps: Clash Verge Rev — best GUI with rule-based routing

ios.title: 📱 iOS
apps: v2RayTun — top pick, fast, works great with Vision flow

android.title: 🤖 Android
apps: v2rayNG — main Android client, open-source, split tunneling
Clash Meta for Android — powerful rule-based routing

help.title: Bot Help
steps: Use the key in the corresponding app

how_to_add_key.choose_protocol: 🔑 How to add a key? Choose your protocol:

outline.title: 🌿 How to add an Outline key
steps: Paste the key into the input field

vless.title: ⚡ How to add a VLESS key
steps: Download a compatible app (v2rayN, v2rayNG, Streisand, etc.)
In the app, tap "+" or "Import from clipboard"
The key will be automatically recognized and added
Select the added server and connect
If the app supports QR — you can scan instead of pasting

keys.no_active:
You don't have any active keys yet.

Choose a plan to purchase VPN access.
keys.refresh_success: Key refreshed! Copy the new key and add it to Outline:
connect_steps: Add the key to the app
keys.check_stats_hint: You can check usage statistics in the "My Keys" section

activation_pending.title: Payment received, but there was an issue
activation_pending.payment_received: Your payment was successfully processed, but a temporary error occurred while creating the VPN key.
activation_pending.will_notify: You will receive the key once the system is restored.
activation_pending.support_hint: If you don't receive the key within 30 minutes, please contact support.

plans.checkout_hint: Click on the desired plan for instant purchase

payments.after_payment: After payment you will instantly receive a VPN key for connection.
payments.invoice_sent: Invoice sent! Click "Pay" to complete the purchase.
connect_steps: Add the key to the app
payments.step3: Add the key to the app
payments.check_stats: You can check usage statistics in the "My Keys" section

referral.title: 🎁 Referral Program
referral.description: Invite friends and get 30% from each purchase!
how_it_works: Share your referral link with friends
When a friend makes a purchase, you get 30% of the amount
Funds can be withdrawn 14 days after referral purchase
Payouts are processed manually by administration
referral.invite_text:
🎁 Join Let me Out VPN!

Get fast and secure VPN for just a few Telegram stars!

✨ Use my referral link:
referral.share_link: Share this link with friends to earn 30% from their purchases!
referral.no_referrals:
You don't have any referrals yet.

Share the link with friends to start earning!

stats.title: Usage Statistics
stats.key_expired: Key expired! Buy a new one to continue.
